cat.term.desc: Low-cost pure protection for your family
cat.wholeLife.desc: Cover for life, income when you need it
cat.moneyBack.desc: Get paid back at regular intervals
cat.pension.desc: Turn your savings into a lifelong pension
cat.ulip.desc: Market-linked growth with a life cover
cat.rider.desc: Extra protection layered on any base plan
home.hero.eyebrow: Plans referenced from LIC of India's public product list
home.hero.title: Find the right plan without reading fifty brochures.
home.hero.subtitle: Browse every LIC plan category in one place, in English or Hindi, or just tell Bindu what you're saving for.
home.categories.title: Browse by category
home.why.title: Why start here
home.why.1.title: Every plan, one page
home.why.1.body: Term, endowment, money-back, pension and ULIP plans sit side by side so you can compare instead of hunting.
home.why.2.title: Bindu only recommends what's listed here
home.why.2.body: Our assistant matches your need to plans already on this site — it won't invent a scheme that doesn't exist.
home.why.3.title: English or Hindi, your choice
home.why.3.body: Switch anytime from the top bar. Your choice is remembered for next time.
home.cta.title: Not sure which category fits you?
home.cta.body: Answer a few quick questions and Bindu will shortlist plans from this site that match your goal — or connect you to a callback.
plans.title: All plans
plans.subtitle: Filter by category or search by name. Tap any plan for full details.
plans.empty: No plans match that search. Try a different keyword or category.
plan.officialLink: See official plan page on licindia.in
plan.talkToUs: Talk to an advisor about this plan
plan.disclaimer: Summary only. Premiums, exact terms, exclusions and tax benefits are governed by the official policy document — always verify with LIC or a licensed advisor before buying.
riders.title: Riders you can add to most base plans
riders.subtitle: Riders are optional add-ons — they don't stand alone, they attach to a base plan for extra protection.
about.title: About this site
about.body1: This is an independent, informational website built to help you compare LIC of India's publicly listed plan categories in one place, in English and Hindi.
about.body2: It is not the official LIC website and is not affiliated with or endorsed by LIC. For binding terms, premium quotes, or to buy a policy, always use licindia.in or speak with a licensed LIC advisor.
about.body3: Have a plan you'd like added, or spot something outdated? Reach out from the Contact page.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and preferred plan and we'll have someone call you back.
contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Thank you! We've noted your details — expect a call soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong sending this. Please call us directly instead.
footer.disclaimer: SurakshaPath is an independent site referencing LIC of India's public plan information. Not affiliated with or endorsed by LIC. Verify all terms on licindia.in before purchase.
footer.rights: All plan names and product details belong to Life Insurance Corporation of India.
chat.name: Bindu
chat.msg.greet: Namaste! I'm Bindu 👋 I can help you shortlist a plan from this site, or connect you with an advisor. What should I call you?
chat.msg.askNeed: Nice to meet you, {{name}}! What are you mainly looking for today?
chat.msg.askAge: Got it. Which age group are you in?
chat.msg.askBudget: And roughly how much can you set aside for premium each year?
chat.msg.thinking: Let me check what fits from our plan list…
chat.msg.results: Based on what you've told me, these plans from our catalogue could fit, {{name}}:
chat.msg.noResults: I don't have a close match on this site for that combination yet, {{name}} — but our team can look at your full situation.
chat.msg.askContact: Would you like a callback about these? Share your phone number and I'll pass it on.
chat.msg.phoneThanks: Thank you! We've noted {{phone}} — someone from the team will call you soon.
chat.msg.declineContact: No problem! Feel free to browse the plans above, or come back to me anytime.
chat.msg.invalidPhone: That doesn't look like a valid phone number — could you share a 10-digit mobile number?
chat.msg.restartPrompt: Want to start over or explore plans on your own?
chat.msg.error: Sorry, I couldn't send that — please try the Contact page or call us directly.
